These games are all great options for a big group, promoting social interaction, teamwork, and plenty of laughter. You can't go wrong with any of these choices!

- [2023-05-25] **Comprehensive leave management system should allow for escalation of leave requests to higher management if necessary** — This will ensure that leave requests are thoroughly reviewed and decisions are made fairly.
